items.title: Mason Plumlee began the season as a veteran voice during his second stint with the #Hornets. Now he's suiting up in the NBA Finals.
items.author: Rod Boone
items.body_excerpt:
Mason Plumlee began the season as a veteran voice during his second stint with the #Hornets. Now he's suiting up in the NBA Finals.

Spoke with him yesterday about the journey, his days in the Carolinas, Wemby and Spurs key to beating the Knicks. 🆓️🔗 #nbasky

www.charlotteobserver.com/sports/charl...

media.title: Mason Plumlee’s season began with the Hornets. Now he’s suiting up in NBA Finals
media.description: Former Duke standout spoke with The Charlotte Observer in advance of Game 1 of NBA Finals featuring San Antonio Spurs vs. New York Knicks.
